acquisitionScope.edition: Project Gutenberg electronic editions of the English Dominican Province/Benziger translation, with Sandra K. Perry source e-text and David McClamrock corrections and editorial additions
acquisitionScope.corpusBoundary: This acquisition preserves the four official Project Gutenberg artifacts only. It does not compile, normalize, index, or publish corpus text.
excluded: all parser, corpus package, catalog, runtime, database, migration, and workflow changes

acquisitionPolicy.redirectPolicy: No redirect is accepted for an archive or catalog snapshot. A redirect, a non-HTTPS URL, a non-www.gutenberg.org host, a query, a fragment, or a pathname mismatch fails closed.
acquisitionPolicy.storagePolicy: Raw ZIP archives, catalog snapshots, extracted HTML evidence, notice evidence, and provenance evidence are local-only under local/ and must remain ignored. The lock and receipt are hash/provenance metadata, not corpus text.
acquisitionPolicy.archiveSafetyPolicy: Only the exact reviewed member set is accepted. ZIP64, encrypted entries, duplicate or normalization-colliding paths, unsafe paths, symlinks, unexpected members, unsupported compression, oversized members, malformed local headers, CRC mismatch, and ambiguous or missing HTML fail closed.
acquisitionPolicy.noClobberPolicy: Acquisition never replaces an existing archive, snapshot, evidence file, or receipt. Any destination, symlink, or unsafe parent collision fails closed.

rightsAndProvenance.territoryCaveat: The catalog statement and internal notice support a United States position only; this lock makes no worldwide public-domain conclusion.

requiredPhrases: This eBook is for the use of anyone anywhere in the United States
If you are not located in the United States,

you may
do practically ANYTHING in the United States with eBooks not protected
by U.S. copyright law.

electronicEditionProvenance.sourceEtextAvailability: made available through the Christian Classics Ethereal Library <http://www.ccel.org>
disclosedEditorActions: added the dedication, tables of contents, Prologue, and question/article numbering from the Benziger Brothers printed translation
checked some obvious Benziger Brothers errors against a Latin text and marked corrections with bracketed English text
presented Benziger Brothers footnote matter in brackets at its textual position
accepted responsibility for other electronic-edition divergences from the Benziger Brothers edition
electronicEditionProvenance.translator: Fathers of the English Dominican Province
electronicEditionProvenance.ccelBoundary: CCEL is recorded solely as disclosed historical provenance. This acquisition makes no CCEL request and stores no CCEL HTML, metadata, navigation, annotation, or packaging.

comparisonWitness.relationship: Independent PIMS / University of Toronto Internet Archive page-image comparison and corroboration witness; it is not an input to this acquisition and is not copied or transcribed here.
